text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of King Halo's debut race finally arrives.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Today I make my grand debut! First
place, here I come!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, did you hear? It seems Sky and Special
Week haven't made their debut yet!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: In other words, I will be the first to grace the masses with my ravishing running! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she says this, I hear a voice coming from the
TV in the waiting room.

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
Wow! What a truly amazing debut Grass Wonder
gave us the pleasure of witnessing yesterday!

text_block_list.name: TV
text_block_list.text:
I agree! Her prowess on the track was
unforgettable.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
choice_data_list: Get out there and bring back the win!
Get out there and bring back the win!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Like it even needs to be said!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It seems Grass has already had her debut. Is she
trying to outshine me?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
No matter. I'll run so spectacularly it'll wipe
everyone's memories of her performance!
